info.title: Antsroute API
info.description:
This public API allows you to synchronize your data with Antsroute. After subscribing to Antsroute with the proper plan, you will be able to generate an API key for using this API.
Then you will be able to directly create service/delivery/collect in Antsroute planning or basket. It will also be easy to retrieve current status of your service(s)/delivery(s)/collect(s).

In order to use this API, you need an API key you can generate in your Antsroute account ( in Antsroute, click on your top right name and select API Key ). This API Key has to be added as a HTTP Header ( "cakey" ) for all your requests.To be able to test the API directly from this page, first click on the Authorize button below and paste your API key.

put.summary: Plan a service/delivery/collect for a specific day by Antsroute id.
put.description:
This method allow to schedule a service/delivery/collect with a specific date. This operation won't be allowed if service/delivery/collect is already in a started/terminated route. Depending of the state :
  • PLANNED: if the route is not started, the service/delivery/collect will be remove from the route and move as unassigned at the given date
  • CONFIRMED: operation not allowed
  • PENDING: operation not allowed
  • UNASSIGNED: the service/delivery/collect will move as unassigned at the given date
  • CANCELED: the service/delivery/collect will move as unassigned at the given date
  • DONE: operation not allowed
  • DELETED: the service/delivery/collect will be unarchived and moved as unassigned at the given date

parameters.name: scheduledDate
parameters.description: format: yyyy-MM-dd

500.description: An error occurs during processing of the request.

tags: Search availabilities and validate one in your planning
post.summary: Search service/delivery/collect availabilities in your planning
post.description:
This method allows you to search availabilities for a service/delivery/collect in your planning between the provided dates and for the requested timeslots. Response will contain a list of available date/timeslot pairs.
Those availabilities will be reserved and valid for the duration returned in response. This duration validity can be configured in optimization settings of your site in Antsroute. Once one availability is validated, all others are released.
If none of the returned availabilities is useful, DON'T FORGET TO CANCEL THIS SEARCH REQUEST TO RELEASE ALL RESERVED AVAILABILITIES.

This method allows you to search a maximum of 12 date/timeslot pairs. For example, searching availabilities for 3 timeslots between 2022-01-01 and 2022-01-03 accounts for 3 * 3 = 9 pairs.

500.description: An error occurs during processing of the request.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the search availabilities request you want to cancel

endDateTime.description: End date of the customer absence

AgentUpdate.description: Agent object to update agent informations

externalId.description: Id in your system. Enables to make link between Antsroute Id and your Id. This Id will be unique, it will be impossible to create two agents with the same externalId

skills.description: List of skill names associated to the agent.
skills.pattern: Comma separated list of skill names

Capacity.description: This object represents a capacity (e.g. volume) for a service/delivery/collect and its value.

capacityName.description: Name of the capacity type defined in Antsroute. This name should respect case and accent

capacityValue.description: Value of the related capacity name for the order,

dueDate.description: Due date of the service/delivery/collect: Maximum date for the fulfillment

openDate.description: Open date of the service/delivery/collect: Minimum date for the fulfillment

duration.description: Duration in minutes of the service/delivery/collect. Specifying a duration will override the duration from the order type

externalId.description: Id in your system of the service/delivery/collect. Enable to make link between Antsroute Id and your Id. This Id will be unique, it will be impossible to create two orders with the same externalId

price.description: Price of the service/delivery/collect. If not specified it will be calculated according to your configuration.

orderTypes.description: List of Type of services names

orderType.example: The name of a type of service you defined in the application

skills.description: List of skill names the agent must have to fulfill this service/delivery/collect

skill.description: Name of a skill the agent must have to fulfill this service/delivery/collect

mandatoryAgent.description: Well formed email address of the agent who must execute the service/delivery/collect

packages.description: List of packages associated to the delivery. Package setting must be activated for the corresponding site

items.description: List of items associated to this service/delivery/collect. Item setting must be activated for the corresponding site

type.description: Type of the order to create

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done. This timeslot has priority over the custom time slot.

customTimeSlot.description: Custom time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done (custom timeslots are not added to the list of timeslots in Antsroute)

loading.description: Loading information of a delivery ( the type field must be set to DELIVERY if a loading is defined

unloading.description: Unloading information of a collect ( the type field must be set to COLLECT if a unloading is defined

CreateCustomer.description: This object represents a customer for which you can create a service/delivery/collect

mobileNumber.description: Mobile phone number of the customer in international format

email.description: Well formed email of the customer

externalId.description: Id in your system of the customer. Enables to make link between Antsroute Id and your Id. This Id will be unique, it will be impossible to create two customers with the same externalId

favoriteAgents.description: Favorite agents of the customer. Appointments of this customer have to be done by those agents
favoriteAgents.pattern: Comma separated list of agents' email

forbiddenAgents.description: Forbidden agents of the customer. Appointments of this customer can't be done by those agents
forbiddenAgents.pattern: Comma separated list of agents' email

openingHoursAlwaysOpen.description: Put false to add custom opening hours in the field openingHours. Put true to let the customer always open.

openingHours.description: Default opening hours of the customer. You can add a maximum of 2 opening hours for the same day of the week. For example open Monday from 08:00 to 12:00 and from 14:00 to 18:00. Two opening hours for the same day of week can't overlap

skills.description: List of skills names the agent must have to fulfill services/deliveries/collects to this customer

startDate.description: Start date of the customer absence

endDate.description: End date of the customer absence

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which the loading of the delivery has to be done

comments.description: Comments about the loading of the delivery.

doneDate.description: The date the order has been done.

cancelledDate.description: The date the loading has been cancelled.

resolutionComments.description: Comment about the resolution of the loading.

location.description: Location information about the loading of the delivery

openDate.description: Open date of the service/delivery/collect: Minimum date for the fulfillment

duration.description: Duration in minutes of the service/delivery/collect. Specifying a duration will override the duration from the order type

externalId.description: Id in your system of the service/delivery/collect. Enable to make link between Antsroute Id and your Id. This Id will be unique, it will be impossible to create two orders with the same externalId

price.description: Price of the service/delivery/collect. If not specified it will be calculated according to your configuration.

orderTypes.description: List of Type of services names

items.description: List of items associated to this service/delivery/collect. Item setting must be activated for the corresponding site

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done. This timeslot has priority over the custom time slot.

customTimeSlot.description: Custom time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done (custom timeslots are not added to the list of timeslots in Antsroute)

scheduleDate.description: Schedule date of the service/delivery/collect. It will be added to the planning at the corresponding date and in UNASSIGNED state. This date must be in the future.

loading.description: Loading information of a delivery ( the type field must be set to DELIVERY if a loading is defined

unloading.description: Unloading information of a collect ( the type field must be set to COLLECT if a unloading is defined

dueDate.description: Due date of the service: Maximum date for the fulfilment

mandatoryAgent.description: Well formed email address of the agent who must execute the service/delivery/collect

packages.description: List of packages associated to the delivery. Package setting must be activated for the corresponding site

items.description: List of items associated to this service/delivery/collect. Item setting must be activated for the corresponding site

type.description: Type of the order to create

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done. This timeslot has priority over the custom time slot.

customTimeSlot.description: Custom time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done (custom timeslots are not added to the list of timeslots in Antsroute)

CreateUnloading.description: This object describes the unloading information of the unloading of a collect.

duration.description: Duration of the unloading of the collect

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which the unloading of the collect has to be done

comments.description: Comments about the unloading of the collect

doneDate.description: The date the unloading has been done.

cancelledDate.description: The date the unloading has been cancelled.

resolutionComments.description: Comment about the resolution of the unloading.

location.description: Location information about the unloading of the collect

CustomField.description: This object represents an order customer field defined in your Antsroute account. This allow you to add your own field properties to a service/delivery/collect

name.description: Name of the custom field defined in Antsroute. This name should respect case and accent

value.description:
Value of the custom field defined in Antsroute. Depending of the type of the custom field ( text, date, integer, boolean, list ), the value must be formatted as following :
  • Text type: text with maximum length of 255 characters. Example: "ORDER-FN-4565"
  • Integer type: integer number. Example: "4565"
  • Date type: a date formatted like YYYY-MM-DD. Example: "2010-05-23"
  • Boolean type: the value can be set to true or null
  • List type with unique choice: text with maximum length of 80 characters. Example: "option 1"
  • List type with multiple choice: a stringified array. Example: "['option 1', 'option 2', 'option\'3]"
  • Photo type: base64 when creating or updating the value, else boolean that indicate the presence of this custom field for an object (order, customer).

Customer.description: This object represents a customer for whom you want to create a service/delivery/collect

mobileNumber.description: Mobile phone number of the customer in international format

email.description: Well formed email of the customer

externalId.description: Id in your system of the customer. Enables to make link between Antsroute Id and your Id. This Id will be unique, it will be impossible to create two customers with the same externalId

favoriteAgents.description: Favorite agents of the customer. Appointments of this customer have to be done by those agents
favoriteAgents.pattern: Comma separated list of agents' email

forbiddenAgents.description: Forbidden agents of the customer. Appointments of this customer can't be done by those agents
forbiddenAgents.pattern: Comma separated list of agents' email

openingHoursAlwaysOpen.description: Put false to add custom opening hours in the field openingHours. Put true to let the customer always open.

openingHours.description: Default opening hours of the customer. You can add a maximum of 2 opening hours for the same day of the week. For example open Monday from 08:00 to 12:00 and from 14:00 to 18:00. Two opening hours for the same day of week can't overlap

skills.description: List of skills names the agent must have to fulfill services/deliveries/collects to this customer

sectors.description: List of sectors to which the customer belongs

startDate.description: Start date of the customer absence

endDate.description: End date of the customer absence

id.description: Antsroute Id of the customer's absence

CustomerSector.description: This object represents the assignment of a customer to a sector defined in Antsroute

daysOfWeek.description: Days of week for which this sector could be applied. Ranges from 1 (Monday) to 7 (Sunday)

agents.description: Email list of agents working in this sector

from.description: The start date of the hourly plan. Must be a monday.

to.description: The end date of the hourly plan. Must be a sunday.

from.description: The start date of the hourly plan. Must be a monday.

to.description: The end date of the hourly plan. Must be a sunday.

from.description: The start date of the hourly plan. Must be a monday.

to.description: The end date of the hourly plan. Must be a sunday.

reference.description: Reference of the item. This reference must be unique in your database.

price.description: Indicate the price as a positive decimal number.

chargedQuantity.description: Item charged quantity for the delivery/collect (need to enable item quantity tracking in mobile settings).

deliveredQuantity.description: Item delivered quantity for the service/delivery/collect (need to enable item quantity tracking in mobile settings).

createIfNotExists.description: Indicates if the item shall be created if it does not exist yet in database.

Loading.description: This object describes the loading information of the loading of a delivery.

duration.description: Duration of the loading of the delivery

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which the loading of the delivery has to be done

comments.description: Comments about the loading of the delivery.

doneDate.description: The date the order has been done.

cancelledDate.description: The date the loading has been cancelled.

resolutionComments.description: Comment about the resolution of the loading.

location.description: Location information about the loading of the delivery

state.description: State of the loading of the delivery

estimatedTimeOfArrival.description: Estimated time of arrival for this service/delivery/collect

LocationWithName.description: This location object is used when adding loading/unloading information when you want to create a delivery or a collect

endDateTime.description: End date of the customer absence

OpeningHour.description: This object represents an opening hour defined for a customer.

dayOfWeek.description: possible values (1: MONDAY, 2: TUESDAY, 3: WEDNESDAY, 4: THURSDAY, 5: FRIDAY, 6: SATURDAY, 7: SUNDAY

openTime.description: Start time of the opening hour

closeTime.description: End time of the opening hour

dueDate.description: Due date of the service/delivery/collect: Maximum date for the fulfillment

openDate.description: Open date of the service/delivery/collect: Minimum date for the fulfillment

duration.description: Duration in minutes of the service/delivery/collect. Specifying a duration will override the duration from the order type

externalId.description: Id in your system of the service/delivery/collect. Enable to make link between Antsroute Id and your Id. This Id will be unique, it will be impossible to create two orders with the same externalId

price.description: Price of the service/delivery/collect. If not specified it will be calculated according to your configuration.

orderTypes.description: List of Type of services names

orderType.example: The name of a type of service you defined in the application

skills.description: List of skill names the agent must have to fulfill this service/delivery/collect

skill.description: Name of a skill the agent must have to fulfill this service/delivery/collect

mandatoryAgent.description: Well formed email address of the agent who must execute the service/delivery/collect

packages.description: List of packages associated to the delivery. Package setting must be activated for the corresponding site

items.description: List of items associated to this service/delivery/collect. Item setting must be activated for the corresponding site

type.description: Type of the order to create

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done. This timeslot has priority over the custom time slot.

customTimeSlot.description: Custom time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done (custom timeslots are not added to the list of timeslots in Antsroute)

cancelReason.description: Cancellation reason choosen by agent when cancelling the order

resolutionComments.description: Resolution comments in case of cancellation or fulfilment

doneDate.description: Date time of the fulfilment of this service.delivery/collect

cancelledDate.description: Date time of the cancelling of this service.delivery/collect

estimatedTimeOfArrival.description: Estimated time of arrival for this service/delivery/collect

affectedAgent.description: Agent's email who is affected to this service/delivery/collect

affectedAgentPhoneNumber.description: Agent's phone number who is affected to this service/delivery/collect

affectedAgentName.description: Agent's name who is affected to this service/delivery/collect

signature.description: Signature (url) of this service/delivery/collect ( if a signature has been added during validation )

photos.description: Photos (urls) of this service/delivery/collect ( if photos have been added during validation)

barcodes.description: Barcodes of this service/delivery/collect (if barcodes have been added during validation)

affectedVehicle.description: Registration number of the affected vehicle to this service/delivery/collect

created.description: Date of creation of the order

packages.description: List of packages associated to the delivery. Package setting must be activated for the corresponding site

dueDate.description: Due date of the service/delivery/collect: Maximum date for the fulfillment

openDate.description: Open date of the service/delivery/collect: Minimum date for the fulfillment

duration.description: Duration in minutes of the service/delivery/collect. Specifying a duration will override the duration from the order type

externalId.description: Id in your system of the service/delivery/collect. Enable to make link between Antsroute Id and your Id. This Id will be unique, it will be impossible to create two orders with the same externalId

price.description: Price of the service/delivery/collect. If not specified it will be calculated according to your configuration.

orderTypes.description: List of Type of services names

orderType.example: The name of a type of service you defined in the application

skills.description: List of skill names the agent must have to fulfill this service/delivery/collect

skill.description: Name of a skill the agent must have to fulfill this service/delivery/collect

mandatoryAgent.description: Well formed email address of the agent who must execute the service/delivery/collect

packages.description: List of packages associated to the delivery. Package setting must be activated for the corresponding site

items.description: List of items associated to this service/delivery/collect. Item setting must be activated for the corresponding site

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done. This timeslot has priority over the custom time slot.

customTimeSlot.description: Custom time bounds between which service/delivery/collect has to be done (custom timeslots are not added to the list of timeslots in Antsroute)

reference.description: Reference of package. This reference must be unique in your database. This reference could be used to get the relative delivery for example

weight.description: Indicates weight of the package in kilogram

length.description: Indicates length of the package in centimeter

width.description: Indicates width of the package in centimeter

height.description: Indicates height of the package in centimeter

co2TotalGramPlanned.description: The total co2 emission initially planned

co2TotalGramEmitted.description: The total amount of co2 actually emitted during the route

totalKilometerDone.description: The total kilometers actually done during the route

home.description: location from where the vehicle starts its route

openDate.description: Open date of the service/delivery/collect: Minimum date for the fulfillment

duration.description: Duration in minutes of the service/delivery/collect. Specifying a duration will override the duration from the order type

packages.description: List of packages associated to the delivery. Package setting must be activated for the corresponding site

items.description: List of items associated to this service/delivery/collect. Item setting must be activated for the corresponding site

type.description: Type of the order to create

beginSearchPeriod.description: Start date of the period of availabilities search.

endSearchPeriod.description: End date of the period of availabilities search. Has to be either equals to or later than beginSearchPeriod.

timeSlotsToCheck.description: List of timeslots to check when searching availabilities in your planning

loading.description: Loading information of a delivery ( the type field must be set to DELIVERY if a loading is defined

unloading.description: Unloading information of a collect ( the type field must be set to COLLECT if an unloading is defined

remainingValidityTimeInMillis.description: Remaining time in milliseconds during which this availability will be reserved

costInKilometers.description: For route insertion scoring ( default mode ): additional kilometers this availability will generate if it is chosen

clusterCost.description: For cluster scoring: cost in terms of clustering. This value is between 0 and 100. Higher is better.

uniqueSearchOrderAvailabilitiesRequestId.description: Unique identifier of the search availabilities request

State.description:
State :
  • CREATED : Order/Delivery/Collect created in Antsroute basket
  • UNASSIGNED : Order/Delivery/Collect has been scheduled but not yet assigned in a route
  • PLANNED : Order/Delivery/Collect scheduled and assigned in a route
  • PENDING : Order/Delivery/Collect scheduled, assigned in a route and waiting confirmation
  • CONFIRMED : Order/Delivery/Collect scheduled, assigned in a route and confirmed
  • CANCELED : Order/Delivery/Collect canceled during the route
  • DONE : Order/Delivery/Collect done during the route
  • DELETED : Order/Delivery/Collect has been deleted
  • REPROGRAMMED : Order/Delivery/Collect has been reprogrammed ( first canceled and then rescheduled )
  • POSTPONE : Order/Delivery/Collect has been postponed at the end of the route
    • +
  • IN_PROGRESS : Order/Delivery/Collect has been started

TimeSlot.description: This object represents a time slot during which a service/delivery/collect has to be fulfilled. For example a delivery between 10:00 and 12:00

start.description: Start time of the time slot

end.description: End time of the time slot

Unloading.description: This object describes the unloading information of the unloading of a collect.

duration.description: Duration of the unloading of the collect

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which the unloading of the collect has to be done

comments.description: Comments about the unloading of the collect

doneDate.description: The date the unloading has been done.

cancelledDate.description: The date the unloading has been cancelled.

resolutionComments.description: Comment about the resolution of the unloading.

location.description: Location information about the unloading of the collect

state.description: State of the unloading of the collect

resolutionComments.description: Comment about the resolution of the loading.

duration.description: Duration of the unloading of the collect

timeSlot.description: Time bounds between which the unloading of the collect has to be done

comments.description: Comments about the unloading of the collect

doneDate.description: The date the unloading has been done.

cancelledDate.description: The date the unloading has been cancelled.

resolutionComments.description: Comment about the resolution of the unloading.

uniqueSearchOrderAvailabilitiesRequestId.description: Unique identifier of the corresponding search availabilities request

breakStartTimeWindow.description: Start time of the window of the break

breakEndTimeWindow.description: Start time of the window of the break

breakDuration.description: Duration of the break in minutes

day.description: Day of the week. Number between 1 and 7. 1 = monday, 7 = sunday.
